titleStmt.title: SII 24.520: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 520. (A.R. No. 49 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of money from the interest on which rice-cakes were to be offered to god Raṅganātha on the day of Chittirai, the asterism of Śrī Vēdavyāsabhaṭṭayyaṅgār Kōvilappayar, by his disciple known as Ēkāṅgi-Bhaṭṭaṉ Tiruvēṅkaḍayyaṉ. The cakes were to be distributed to Śrīvaishṇavas at Kūrattāḻvāṉ-tirumāḷigai. The date Śaka 1530, Kīlaka, Simha, ba. 13, Saturday, Maghā corresponds to A.D. 1608, August 27, Saturday, f.d.t. ·07, f.d.n. ·94.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti . śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvaran śrīvirapradāpa śrīviraveṅkaṭapati devamahārāyar pṛthivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa śakābdam 1000 5 100 3 10 Itaṉ meṟc cellāniṉṟa kilaka samvatssarattu simhanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu trayodeśiyum mantavāramum peṟṟa maghā nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇḍiyakulāśani vaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷa nāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkan tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrībhaṇṭārattukku Ittiruppati śrīvedavyāsabhaṭṭarayyaṅkār śrīpātattu Ekāṅkibhaṭṭar tiruveṅkaṭaya ṉen deṇḍan samarpittu poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . Aṭi yeṉuṭaiya Ubhaiyamāka māsamtoṟum Aṭiyeṉuṭaiya Ācāryar śrīvedaviyāsan paṭṭarayaṅkār kovilappayar tirunakṣatram cittirai nakṣatrattile perumāḷ Orupaṭi tocai Amutu
ceytaruḷumpaṭikku poliyūṭṭukku perumāḷ śrībhaṇṭārattile mutaliṭṭa poṉ 4 10 Intappoṉ nāṟpatukkum mātam Oṉṟukku vaṭṭi nūṟṟukku paṇam Oṉṟekālāka varuṣam Oṉṟukku vaṭṭiyilkkūṭiṉa poṉ 6 Intappoṉ Āṟukkum cilavāka māsam māsam cittirai nakṣatram toṟum perumāḷ Amutu ceytaruḷum tocaippaṭi Oṉṟiṉukku U 5 Āka varuṣam Oṉṟukku poṉ Āṟukkum māsam Orunāḷ Orupaṭi tocaiyum Amutuceytaruḷi Itukku varuṣam viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu Uḷpaṭavum kūrattāḻvāṉ tirumāḷikaiyile koṇṭupoyi śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷukku viṉiyokamākak kaṭavatākavum . Ippaṭikku Intak kayiṅkariyam Ācantrārkkasthāyi Āy putra pautraparamparaiyāy naṭakka kaṭavatākavum . Intappaṭikku poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku kovilkkaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.520 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
